description_long: This airplane features a futuristic, angular design with a wide, swept-back wingspan and a central fuselage that tapers into a long, pointed nose. The wings are thick and appear to be integrated into the main body, with no visible separation between the fuselage and the wing roots. The surface is metallic with a mottled gray texture, giving it a rugged, industrial appearance. The rear section includes a pair of large, rectangular exhausts or intakes, and the tail is split into two horizontal stabilizers with no visible vertical fin. The cockpit is located centrally and slightly forward, with a dark, tinted canopy that blends into the fuselage. No visible landing gear or external engines are present, suggesting a streamlined, possibly conceptual aircraft.
description: A futuristic, metallic airplane with swept-back integrated wings, a pointed nose, and a central dark cockpit canopy. The design is angular and streamlined, with a split horizontal tail and no visible landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, swept-back wings and the pointed nose, with the cockpit canopy barely visible at the top center.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick, integrated wing structure and the elongated nose, with the split tail and large rear exhausts visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the split horizontal tail stabilizers, large rectangular exhausts, and the dark cockpit canopy set into the fuselage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same elongated nose, thick wings, and split tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with wide, swept-back wings integrated into the fuselage and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; possible integrated jet or conceptual propulsion.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin horizontal stabilizers and no visible vertical stabilizer.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy integrated into the fuselage.
